heading: Wednesday Night
text: Variable clouds.  Patchy valley fog late, mainly east of the Greens. Lows in the low to mid 50s, except mid 50s to around 60 in the Champlain and St. Lawrence valleys. Light and variable winds.

heading: Thursday
text: Patchy valley fog early, then sun filtering through increasing high clouds. A rising chance of afternoon showers in New York; chance eastward to the Green Mountains, mainly late in the day. Highs from the mid 70s to around 80. Winds becoming south 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Thursday Night
text: Mostly cloudy. Showers likely, with a chance of thunderstorms. Lows in the 50s to around 60. South to southeast winds around 5 mph.
